description_long: This humanoid robot features a striking, angular design with a predominantly metallic silver and dark brown color scheme. Its body is heavily armored with sharp, blade-like protrusions on the shoulders, forearms, and legs, giving it an aggressive and formidable appearance. The torso is broad and segmented, with intricate mechanical detailing and a central chest plate that suggests reinforced protection. The head is helmet-like, with a faceless, smooth surface and pointed crown, lacking any visible eyes or mouth. The arms and legs are robust, with multiple articulated joints and spiked accents, while the hands are claw-like, enhancing its menacing look. The back displays additional mechanical components and vents, further emphasizing its advanced, combat-ready construction.
description: A heavily armored, silver and brown humanoid robot with sharp, angular features, spiked limbs, and a faceless helmet-like head. Its design is aggressive and mechanical, with intricate detailing and robust, articulated limbs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, armored chest, faceless helmet, and spiked shoulders and limbs, highlighting the robot's imposing and aggressive design.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the depth of the torso, the layered armor on the arms and legs, and the circular mechanical detail on the upper arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the segmented back armor, mechanical components, and vents, as well as the spiked accents on the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same circular arm detail and layered armor, with spikes and mechanical joints visible.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows and legs straight, head facing forward, and shoulders squared.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated metallic and composite armor panels with decorative spikes and mechanical detailing.
attribute_facial_features: The face is a smooth, helmet-like surface with no visible eyes, mouth, or nose, and features a pointed crown; no expressive or display elements are present.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge and rotary joints at the shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles, allowing for a wide range of motion; hands are claw-like with articulated fingers.
